title: Neenga Nalla Irukkonum Lyrics Idhayakkani
stanzas:
Neenga nalla irukkonum
naadu munnera.
indha naatil ulla
yaezhigalin vazhvu munnera(2)

endrum nallavanga ellorum
unga pinnaale.
nee nenaichathellaam
nadakkumunga
kannu munnaale (2)

Neenga nalla irukkonum
naadu munnera.
indha naatil ulla
yaezhigalin vazhvu munnera

uzhaikkum tholargale
ondru koodungal.
ulagam namadhu endru
sindhu paadungal (2)

maedu pallam illaatha
samuthaayam kaana
enna vazhi endru
enni paarungal.
annaa sonna vazhi
kandu nanmai thaedungal

neenga nallaa irukkonum
naadu munnera
indha naadengum illaamai
illai endraaga.

paadupattu sertha porulai
kodukkum podhum inbam.
naalum yaezhai malarndha
mugathai paarkkum podhum inbam.(2)

paeraasaiyaale vandha thunbam
suyanalathin pillai.
suyanalae irukkum nenjil
amaidhi endrum illai. (2)
amaidhi endrum illai.

kaatrum neerum
vaanum neruppum.
podhuvil irukkuthu.
manithan kaalil patta
boomi mattum
pirinthu kidakkuthu. (2)

pirithu vaithu paarpathellaam
manitha idhayame.(2)
ulagil pirivu maari
orumai vandhaal
amaidhi nilavume.
amaidhi  nilavume.

Neenga nalla irukkonum
naadu munnera.
indha naatil ulla
yaezhigalin vazhvu munnera

nadhiyai pola
naamum  nadandhu
payanthara vendum.
kadalai pole
virindha idhayam
irundhida vendum.
vaanam pola pirarukkaaga
azhuthida vendum

vazhum vazhkai ulagil
endrum vilangida vendum.
endrum vilangida vendum.

Neenga nalla irukkonum
naadu munnera.
indha naatil ulla
yaezhigalin vazhvu munnera(2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a message of positivity and togetherness, emphasizing the importance of good people in society.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Idhayakkani, the song reflects the themes of unity and harmony among the characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of S. Janaki, Sirkazhi Govindarajan, and TMS.

When was the song released?

Neenga Nalla Irukkonum was released in 1975.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neenga Nalla Irukkonum, the lyrics beautifully encapsulate the essence of goodness and harmony within society. The song serves as a reminder of the positive impact of good people, resonating deeply with listeners. Its soothing melody and nostalgic vibe evoke a sense of warmth and togetherness, making it a beloved classic. This timeless piece continues to inspire and uplift, reflecting the rich cultural heritage of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neenga Nalla Irukkonum from Idhayakkani is a timeless classic that resonates with the essence of nostalgia and warmth. The heartfelt lyrics by Pulavar Pulamaipithan, combined with the soulful renditions of legendary singers like S. Janaki and Sirkazhi Govindarajan, create an enchanting experience. This song beautifully captures the spirit of togetherness and positivity, making it a cherished gem in Tamil music history.
stanzaMeanings: You should be good, the country will prosper. The way of life in this land will improve.
Good people will always be behind you. Whatever you think will happen in front of your eyes.
You should be good, the country will prosper. The way of life in this land will improve.
Workers, come together. Sing that the world is ours.
Look for a way to see a society without problems. Find the path that leads to goodness as told by elders.
You should be good, the country will prosper. This land has no lack of anything.
When we sing together, it brings joy. Every day, seeing the blooming faces brings joy.
The pain that comes from desires is like a child of selfishness. There is no peace in a heart that is selfish.
The wind, water, sky, and fire are all present. Only the earth that man stands on is different.
Every separation is in the human heart. When unity comes, peace will also come.
You should be good, the country will prosper. The way of life in this land will improve.
Like a river, we should flow and reach our destination. Our hearts should be like the sea, full and open. We should shine like the sky for others.
In this living world, we should always shine. We should always shine.
You should be good, the country will prosper. The way of life in this land will improve.
